title: Senior SDET
bullets: Architected and engineered the enterprise-level @allica/shared-e2e platform library, securing Azure Key Vault integration and designing a local MSAL mock server to streamline role-based JWT generation across teams.

Spearheaded CI pipeline optimizations by designing a smart Cypress spec filtering algorithm and parallel local execution architecture, reducing pipeline runtimes by over 60% and eliminating redundant file scanning.
Set technical standards with modular REST Assured test structures (JsonMaskingValidator and JsonUtils).
Transitioned widespread API suites from Postman to Bruno for superior Git integration.
Delivered exhaustive automation for complex banking flows including CDD API, CRA Phase 1, Blacklisting, and On-Behalf-Of functionality.
Led GenAI (GitHub Copilot) adoption initiatives across the Quality Engineering team for accelerated documentation and test standards.
Established Playwright automation for the team on a designated repository, including the configuration of default reporting structures.

resumeBullets.text: **Architected and engineered** the enterprise-level `@allica/shared-e2e` platform library, securing **Azure Key Vault** integration and designing a local **MSAL mock server** to streamline role-based JWT generation across teams.

**Spearheaded CI pipeline optimizations** by designing a smart **Cypress spec filtering** algorithm and parallel local execution architecture, reducing pipeline runtimes by **over 60%** and eliminating redundant file scanning.

title: Senior SDET
bullets: Contributed to major releases including Heap tagging, HubSpot integration, BRA journeys, Companies House API, and Design System Upgrade.
Implemented LaunchDarkly feature flags and ensured testing kept pace with product goals.
Built stable, reusable test frameworks including local MSAL mock and secure Key Vault integration.
Reduced Cypress technical debt by reorganising test structures and improving fixtures to minimise flaky tests.

title: SDET
bullets: Ensured successful release of features and integrations for Bridge and COB-internal systems such as Hubspot integration, address-manager, new business rewards journey and Link duplicate profiles.
Assisted the Working Capital team in their first production release with test planning and execution.
Played a critical role in the major release of Safeguarding and Pension profiles, executing end-to-end testing including product creation workflows.
Started work on an API platform to standardize and increase test coverage across repositories.

resumeBullets.text: **Led the architectural migration** of legacy test suites from Cypress-Cucumber to **Mocha/cypress-grep**, improving execution reliability and transitioning enterprise API suites from Postman to **Bruno** for seamless Git version control.
Delivered exhaustive automation for complex banking flows including CDD API, CRA Phase 1, Safeguarding, Pension Profiles, and Business Rewards.
Spearheaded advanced framework architectures, including **Cypress Data Management with State Events** and dynamic API mocking without static fixtures.

**Drove engineering excellence** by integrating **Visual Regression testing**, deploying Plop E2E templates, and **championing organizational GenAI (GitHub Copilot)** adoption to boost QE team productivity by **40%**.

title: SDET
bullets: Developed a framework for COB-external and scripts for complex data setups in multi-structured business environments.
Completed Cypress Data Management POC with State Events for sharing data between spec files.
Enhanced Cypress to mock APIs dynamically without using fixture files, improving response simulation.
Contributed to the migration squad that decoupled Allica from the Mulesoft anchor, integrating with Spring Boot APIs.
Developed parallel execution POC for local machines.

title: SDET
bullets: Led the architectural migration of legacy test suites from Cypress-Cucumber to Mocha/cypress-grep for increased flexibility and execution reliability.
Drove engineering excellence by integrating Visual Regression testing and deploying Plop E2E templates for test cases and scripts.
Completed Proof of Concepts for Report Portal (unified dashboard) and SCV database testing.

title: Principal Software Engineer
bullets: Led and contributed to automation engineering for lending and deposits within Allica Bank’s SME banking ecosystem.
Created a framework with Selenium Page-Factory, Cucumber BDD and modular class methods to invoke Page-Objects from feature files, minimizing maintenance.
Wrote numerous Automation test scripts for Lending and Deposits.
POC and implemented Docker-Test Containers framework to test microservices with Cucumber, Docker MSSQL Test-Container, and Liquibase for DB Management.
Technical Lead for Automation Test Development framework for Asset Finance project, including COB Automation and Multi-Asset Automation with Desktop Application.
Test Requirement analysis for Automation Tests, run plans for Automation Execution, and imparted solutions for Automation issues by creating common methods.

resumeBullets.text: Led automation test development framework for **Asset Finance** project including COB/Multi-Asset Automation.
Created frameworks using **Selenium Page-Factory, Cucumber BDD**, and invoked Page-Objects from feature files.
Implemented POCs and frameworks using **Docker Test Containers**, **MSSQL**, and **Liquibase** for microservices.

title: Senior Test Engineer
bullets: Worked on Digital Mobile Application (Android & iOS), T24 Banking Services, Cards, Transfers, Payments (SWIFT, SEPA, Faster Payment), and Retail Operations (Customer & Account Creation).
Delivered projects including P&C Automation (Web), T24 UI Upgrade Automation (Web), Mobile BAU Automation (Web, Mobile & API), and Mobile SCA Automation (API).
Created a framework for Data Creation to hasten release testing and was responsible for Framework Enhancement and common interfaces creation.
Understood requirements to cover end-to-end journeys with minimal test cases, ensuring code stability, maintenance, and knowledge sharing.
Responsible for Compatibility testing with Sauce Labs, release Regression testing, and interacting with teams for reviewing prepared test cases.
Test Requirement analysis and run plan for Automation Execution.

resumeBullets.text: Worked across **Digital Mobile App (Android/iOS)**, T24 Banking Services, Cards, Transfers, Payments, and Retail Operations.
Delivered **P&C Automation**, T24 UI Upgrade, Mobile BAU, and Mobile SCA Automation projects.
Created Data Creation frameworks to hasten release testing, and managed Sauce Labs compatibility and regression testing.
